title: paspalum junceum
intro: Paspalum junceum, also known as Elephant Grass or River Grass, is a tropical plant native to Africa and Asia, characterized by its tall, fibrous stems and broad leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Paspalum junceum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and its fibers can be used to create rope, paper, and other textiles.
